channel.title: Assignments on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Assignments on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: Assignments
item.description:
There are three assignments for this course, due in the lecture session noted in the table. The assignments are all from the text: Rudin, Walter. Real and Complex Analysis. McGraw-Hill International Editions: Mathematics Series. McGraw-Hill Education - Europe, 1986. ISBN: 9780070542341.

LEC # ASSIGNMENTS
8 Homework 1 - Chapter 1: 3-12
12 Homework 2 - Chapter 2: 5-9, 20
20 Homework 3 - Chapter 3: 4c, 4d, 10, 11, 13, 18b, 23, 25
